Symptom: Dead outlet, bad connection in box
Flickering lights, whole house, dims when fridge starts
Typical fix: Loose neutral at service. **This is serious.**
Hard short. Isolate circuit, repair fault.

Symptom: Breaker trips after running a while
Typical fix: Overload or thermal-failing breaker. Diagnose, replace breaker or re-allocate load.
Identify offending appliance or wire, swap to combo or address fault

Symptom: Outdoor outlet stopped working after storm
Typical fix: Replace GFCI, often the only damage

Symptom: Burning smell at panel or outlet
Typical fix: Emergency. We'll make safe first, repair second.
